title: StraySkins
description: For offline account players, skins and capes are displayed and switched normally in multiplayer
body:
为离线账号玩家在多人游戏中正常显示并切换皮肤和披风

This mod can display and switch skins and capes normally in multiplayer for offline account players.

Based on the SkinRestorer mod, with reference to the CustomSkinLoader mod. Supports managing appearances via the /strayskins family command. If the launcher has a skin, it will automatically take effect when you enter the game.

Note: In multiplayer games, each client and server needs to install the mod to be fully functional. Skin size: 64*64, Cloak size: 64*32

Multiplayer support server and multiplayer room online, /strayskins mojang command server only.

Local files are supported, which need to be placed in the strayskins folder of the client instance or server directory.



There may be compatibility issues with placeholder mods

需要看后续更新的看这里
https://www.mcmod.cn/class/26683.html
